description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image. Define three jobs (beta, nightly, stable) that run in the default test stage. Each job runs a before_script that updates apt, installs python3-dev, clones https://github.com/tobyn/zbase32.git into pyzbase32 and installs it with python3 ./setup.py install --user, then installs the appropriate Rust toolchain (beta, nightly, or stable) via rustup toolchain install and sets it as default. The beta and stable jobs execute cargo rustc --lib --verbose -- -D warnings, add the clippy component, run cargo clippy with -D clippy::all -D clippy::pedantic -D warnings, and finally cargo test --verbose --features python_tests. The nightly job runs cargo test --verbose --features unstable,python_tests, is allowed to fail, and uses the nightly toolchain. Set QUICKCHECK_GENERATOR_SIZE, QUICKCHECK_MAX_TESTS, QUICKCHECK_MIN_TESTS_PASSED, and QUICKCHECK_TESTS variables as defined.
